methods.name: getTileBoundingVolume
methods.description:
//TODO Adapt for Sphere
To maintain numerical stability during this subdivision process,
the actual bounding volumes should not be computed progressively by subdividing a non-root tile volume.
Instead, the exact bounding volumes are computed directly for a given level.

methods.name: getGeometricError
methods.description: Each child’s geometricError is half of its parent’s geometricError.

methods.name: parseImplicitURI
methods.description:
Replaces placeholder tokens in a URI template with the corresponding tile properties.

The URI template should contain the tokens:
- `{level}` for the tile's subdivision level.
- `{x}` for the tile's x-coordinate.
- `{y}` for the tile's y-coordinate.
- `{z}` for the tile's z-coordinate.

params.name: tile
params.description: The tile object containing properties __level, __x, __y, and __z.

params.name: uri
params.description: The URI template string with placeholders.

returns.description: The URI with placeholders replaced by the tile's properties.

methods.name: parseImplicitURIBuffer
methods.description:
Generates the full external buffer URI for a tile by combining an implicit URI with a buffer URI.

First, it parses the implicit URI using the tile properties and the provided template. Then, it creates a new URL
relative to the tile's base path, removes the last path segment, and appends the buffer URI.

params.name: tile
params.description:
The tile object that contains properties:
  - __level: the subdivision level,
  - __x, __y, __z: the tile coordinates,

params.name: uri
params.description: The URI template string with placeholders for the tile (e.g., `{level}`, `{x}`, `{y}`, `{z}`).

params.name: bufUri
params.description: The buffer file name to append (e.g., "0_1.bin").

methods.name: clampPoint
methods.description: Clamps the given point within the bounds of this OBB

methods.name: distanceToPoint
methods.description:
Returns the distance from any edge of this OBB to the specified point.
If the point lies inside of this box, the distance will be 0.

classes.name: ImageOverlayPlugin
classes.description:
Plugin for overlaying tiled image data on top of 3D Tiles geometry.

Supports multiple overlay types including XYZ, WMS, WMTS, TMS, GeoJSON,
Cesium Ion imagery, and Google Maps tiles. Overlays can be layered with
configurable opacity, color tinting, and z-ordering.

properties.name: enableTileSplitting
properties.description:
Whether to split tiles for better overlay alignment at higher zoom levels.
When enabled, tiles are subdivided to match overlay resolution more closely.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description:
Disposes of the plugin and releases all resources.
Removes all overlays and cleans up event listeners.

methods.name: getAttributions
methods.description: Collects attribution information from all visible overlays.

params.name: target
params.description: Array to append attribution objects to

methods.name: addOverlay
methods.description: Adds an overlay to the plugin.

params.name: overlay
params.description: The overlay to add (XYZTilesOverlay, WMSTilesOverlay, etc.)

params.name: order
params.description:
Z-order for rendering (higher values render on top).
                                     If null, overlay is added on top of existing overlays.

methods.name: setOverlayOrder
methods.description: Changes the z-order of an existing overlay.

params.name: order
params.description: New z-order value (higher values render on top)

methods.name: deleteOverlay
methods.description: Removes an overlay from the plugin and releases its resources.

params.name: options.enableTileSplitting
params.description: Enable tile subdivision for better overlay alignment

classes.name: ImageOverlay
classes.description:
Base class for all image overlays.

Provides common functionality for opacity, color, and projection handling.
Extend this class to create custom overlay types.

properties.name: isPlanarProjection
properties.description: Whether this overlay uses planar projection (has a frame).

classes.name: TiledImageOverlay
classes.description:
Base class for tiled image overlays (XYZ, WMS, WMTS, TMS, etc.).

Handles tile loading, caching, and level-of-detail management.
Extend this class for custom tile-based overlay sources.

properties.name: tiling
properties.description: The tiling scheme used by this overlay.

properties.name: projection
properties.description: The projection used by this overlay's tiles.

properties.name: aspectRatio
properties.description: The aspect ratio of the overlay (width/height).

properties.name: fetchOptions
properties.description: Fetch options passed to tile requests.

classes.name: XYZTilesOverlay
classes.description:
Overlay for XYZ tile services (e.g., OpenStreetMap, Mapbox, etc.).

XYZ tiles use a simple URL pattern with {z}/{x}/{y} placeholders
for zoom level and tile coordinates.

classes.name: GeoJSONOverlay
classes.description:
Overlay for rendering GeoJSON data as an image layer.

Supports Point, LineString, Polygon, and their Multi- variants.
Features are rendered to a canvas and displayed as an overlay.

classes.name: WMSTilesOverlay
classes.description:
Overlay for WMS (Web Map Service) tile services.

Supports OGC WMS 1.1.1 and 1.3.0 specifications.
Can be combined with WMSCapabilitiesLoader to automatically configure.

classes.name: WMTSTilesOverlay
classes.description:
Overlay for WMTS (Web Map Tile Service) tile services.

Supports OGC WMTS 1.0 specification.
Use with WMTSCapabilitiesLoader for automatic configuration.

classes.name: TMSTilesOverlay
classes.description:
Overlay for TMS (Tile Map Service) tile services.

TMS uses an inverted Y-axis compared to XYZ tiles (origin at bottom-left).

classes.name: CesiumIonOverlay
classes.description:
Overlay for Cesium Ion imagery assets.

Requires a Cesium Ion account and API token.
Supports various underlying imagery providers (TMS, Bing, Google 2D).

classes.name: GoogleMapsOverlay
classes.description:
Overlay for Google Maps 2D tiles.

Requires a Google Cloud API key with the Map Tiles API enabled.
Supports session tokens for proper attribution and usage tracking.
